arts.ttl: Newcastle ‘most active in pursuit’ of Viktor Gyokeres
arts.sum: Newcastle United are the club ‘most active in pursuit’ of Sporting Lisbon striker Viktor Gyokeres. The Swedish striker is a transfer target for several of Europe’s elite clubs after an explosive period at Sporting Lisbon. Gyokeres has scored 76 goals in 81 appearance for the Portuguese champions and was the Primeira Liga’s leading scorer last […] The post Newcastle ‘most active in pursuit’ of Viktor Gyokeres first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.sum: Viktor Gyokeres is probably one of the hottest names in football circles for the current transfer window. The Swedish forward has earned it with a stellar performance in the Portuguese league, resulting in several big names considering throwing offers his way.
